videos.headline: Arizona's Noah Fifita keeps it for himself with a 15-yard TD
videos.description: Noah Fifita scores a 15-yard touchdown to give Arizona a 7-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona's Noah Fifita keeps it for himself with a 15-yard TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Fifita stretches out for 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Noah Fifita gets the push and stretches out the ball for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Kansas State's Jayce Brown takes a direct snap 75 yards for a TD

videos.headline: Avery Johnson barrels into the end zone for a Kansas State TD
videos.description: Avery Johnson just gets the ball into the end zone to tie the score 17-17.
